inputs.label: Reference Frequency (A4)
inputs.businessContext: Standard tuning frequency for A4 note.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard tuning frequency for A4 note.
businessContext_i18n.tr: A4 notası için standart akort frekansı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence d'accord standard pour la note A4.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de afinación estándar para la nota A4.

inputs.label: Reference MIDI Note
inputs.businessContext: MIDI note number for the reference pitch; A4=69.

businessContext_i18n.en: MIDI note number for the reference pitch; A4=69.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Referans perde için MIDI nota numarası; A4=69.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Numéro de note MIDI pour la hauteur de référence ; A4=69.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de nota MIDI para el tono de referencia; A4=69.

inputs.label: Target MIDI Note
inputs.businessContext: MIDI note number for which to calculate frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: MIDI note number for which to calculate frequency.
businessContext_i18n.de: MIDI-Notennummer, für die die Frequenz berechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Numéro de note MIDI pour lequel calculer la fréquence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de nota MIDI para el cual calcular la frecuencia.

inputs.label: Cents Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: Fine-tuning adjustment in cents (100 cents = 1 semitone).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fine-tuning adjustment in cents (100 cents = 1 semitone).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cent cinsinden ince ayar (100 cent = 1 yarım ses).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement fin en cents (100 cents = 1 demi-ton).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste de afinación fina en cents (100 cents = 1 semitono).
